package rulefixtures

// scenario for bufio_scanner_small_buffer_for_large_lines: `bufio.NewScanner(r)` without `scanner.Buffer()` when processing files with lines > 64KB
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: warning.
type Rule443NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario443Negative(records []Rule443NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
